title: Crispy Spicy Turkish Chicken Skewers
description: A fusion of Chinese flavors with a Turkish twist, these crispy spicy chicken skewers are a delicious and easy meal option.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, and sesame oil to make the marinade.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
6. Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
7. Dip each chicken piece into the crispy rice cereal, pressing the cereal onto the chicken to help it stick.
8. Place the coated chicken pieces onto the prepared baking sheet.
9. Drizzle with vegetable oil and sprinkle with Turkish chili flakes.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and crispy.
11. Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped cilantro.
